title: [circt-opt] Segmentation fault during XOR op building

features.name: comb xnor with hw.constant true in llhd.process
features.description: Code should include a comb.xor or comb.xnor operation with hw.constant true operand inside an llhd.process block

features.name: async reset always block with constant assignment
features.description: Code should include a module with always block敏感列表包含or negedge rstn and a register assigned a constant value inside

features.name: comb xor with hw constant operand
features.description: Code should include comb.xor operation where one operand is hw.constant true and the operation result type is i1
